name: dt-style-guide
description: Dynatrace corporate style guide — vendored terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, and formatting rules with a dt-style-checker agent, a dt-doc-fixer agent, a dt-style-rules skill, three commands (/dt-style-refresh, /dt-review-pr, /dt-review-docs), and vendored reference docs. Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter (Vale) is available.
